title: What the US CLARITY Act could mean for India’s crypto future – Expert says, ‘rules must fit India’s large market’
summary: The Senate Banking Committee advanced the CLARITY Act, aiming to regulate cryptocurrencies amid industry tensions. Supported by some Democrats, the bill moves to the full Senate, indicating a shift towards structured crypto policymaking and potential global regulatory implications.

title: How fuel price hikes could impact inflation and your daily expenses; expert warns food, transport costs may rise
summary: Petrol and diesel prices in India increased by ₹3 per litre, with CNG rising by ₹2 per kg. This hike aims to offset losses from rising crude oil prices, but concerns about its impact on retail inflation persist, especially in sectors like agriculture and transportation.

title: Income Tax return filing for AY 2026-27 begins: Check who can file ITR-1 and ITR-4
summary: ITR filing for AY 2026-27 begins as the Income Tax Department enables Excel utilities and online filing for ITR-1 and ITR-4 on the e-Filing portal for eligible taxpayers in the country.

title: Gold and silver price today, 15 May: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
summary: Gold price today: Gold rates dropped on the MCX on Friday morning amid a stronger US dollar, driven by elevated crude oil prices. International gold prices declined to an over one-week low, looking set for a weekly decline.

title: Petrol, diesel, CNG, LPG get costlier: How much more Indians are paying amid West Asia conflict – City-wise rates here
summary: In May, Indian consumers experienced a significant rise in fuel prices, with petrol and diesel increasing by ₹3 per litre, the first hike in four years. CNG prices also rose by ₹2 per kg, reflecting the impact of escalating global crude prices due to the West Asia conflict.

title: Petrol, Diesel Price Hike News LIVE: Consumers worried after fuel price hike; Oppn asks ‘are these acche din?’
summary: Petrol, Diesel Price hike news LIVE: Petrol and diesel prices across India were raised by ₹3 per litre on May 15, pushing fuel costs higher in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai and other cities amid surging crude prices due to Iran war. Track Petrol, Diesel Price hike news LIVE Updates here

title: Focus on the horizon: Bajaj Finserv's Nimesh Chandan sees Nifty at 27,000 despite volatility
summary: As markets swing on global headlines, Bajaj Finserv AMC CIO Nimesh Chandan says investors should focus on long-term trends, not noise — and sees the Nifty heading to 27,000.

title: Explained | What caused the hike in petrol and diesel prices and why rates differ across Indian cities
summary: Petrol and diesel prices increased by ₹3 per litre after four years without revisions. Petrol now costs ₹97.77 in Delhi, while diesel is ₹90.67. Prices vary by city, with significant increases attributed to rising global energy costs amid geopolitical tensions.

title: Living in Mumbai on ₹25,000? Woman’s monthly budgeting formula goes viral – ‘It's hard girl, just own it’
summary: A woman claims that ₹25,000 is sufficient to live in Mumbai, sharing her budgeting tips in a viral video. While some praise her financial skills, others question the feasibility of her budget, noting her expenses seem to exceed her claimed limit.

title: Clarity Act clears key Senate hurdle: What it means for crypto users, stablecoins and exchanges
summary: The Senate Banking Committee advanced the Clarity Act, establishing cryptocurrency regulations. With bipartisan support, the bill aims to create transparency in crypto transactions and anti-money laundering rules

title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei slumps to weekly loss on tech share profit-taking
summary: Chip-testing equipment maker Advantest was ​the biggest drag, slumping 7.9% to shave 544 index points from the Nikkei. ​Fellow heavyweight Tokyo Electron lost 1.8%.

title: Australian shares flat as housing-tax changes, global risks cap volatile week
